introduction: Filthy rich Katharina amends her assistant Pepijn's plan for a new, much more lucrative factory in town, omitting any respect for the environment. Grandpa's treasured Valentine train's shed is in the way, so she decides on arson. That's hard with the local voluntary fire crew, including Toby, practicing nearby. They are however eliminated by slipping a poison into the cake grandma, who failed the physical test to join, baked for them. Grandpa and Mieke are trapped in the shed when the fire i started, but although knocked out, Toby can be transformed into his superhero alter-ego.
